headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all H1/H2.

body.importCommand: Import from Google Fonts (IBM Plex Sans)
body.usage: Use for all data tables, inputs, and forms. Highly legible.

mono.usage: For Device IDs (DEV-YYYY-XXXX), ticket numbers, and timestamps.

primary.description: Deep Navy Blue. Used for Sidebars, Header, and primary solid buttons.

secondary.description: Signal Blue. Used for active states, CTA borders, and links.

accent.description: Cyan. Used sparingly for status pulse animations or real-time indicators.

background.description: Pure white for main canvas to maintain high contrast. Slate-50 for off-white sections.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-none sm:rounded-md shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
surfaces.header_glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.mobile_bottom_nav: bg-white border-t border-slate-200 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] z-50 fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 pb-safe

layout_modes.dashboard: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Override stretch with align-self where needed.
layout_modes.kanban: Horizontal flex with overflow-x-auto, fixed column widths (w-80), snap-x snap-mandatory on mobile.
layout_modes.mobile_pwa: Mobile-first, single column. Oversized tap targets (min-h-[48px]). Bottom sheet (Drawer) for actions instead of Modals.

components.button: Rounded-md (NOT fully pill). Heavy font weight. Hover state MUST explicitly set text color and background.
components.table: Shadcn Table. Zebra striping or clear bottom borders. Monospace for IDs.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Use sharp lines, remove excessive grid lines. Use status colors for data.
components.map: Leaflet with a minimalist/grayscale map tile (e.g., CartoDB Positron) so the colorful engineer markers pop out.
components.kanban_card: Left border thickened (border-l-4) with status color. Compact metadata.

motion.page_transition: Framer Motion layout animations for Kanban cards moving columns.
motion.micro: Hover lift (-translate-y-0.5) on cards. Status indicators should have a ping animation (absolute w-full h-full animate-ping opacity-75).

image_urls.description: Modern corporate skyline for the login screen background (apply dark blue overlay bg-[#0A1128]/80).

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React (already installed). Use solid strokes, standard sizes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Treat Admin Panel and Mobile PWA as distinct viewports but sharing this exact theme token set. DO NOT build mobile PWA just as shrunk admin panel. Mobile PWA needs a bottom app bar navigation and full-screen swipeable drawers for actions.
For the Admin panel, use a persistent sidebar (dark navy #0A1128) and white main canvas.
For the Mobile PWA, use a bottom navigation bar, hide complex data in Drawers, and prioritize camera/location/signature inputs. Add 'pb-24' to scroll containers to prevent bottom nav overlap.
Map implementation (Leaflet): Use a light grayscale tile layer (CartoDB Positron) so the engineer markers stand out clearly.
Kanban board MUST use Framer Motion for smooth drag/drop or column transitions.
Use react-signature-canvas for digital signatures on the mobile PWA and jspdf/react-pdf for service report generation.
Always apply data-testid to critical elements for testing.
Use Sonner for toast notifications to simulate real-time push events.
